title: Chandra Choodeswarar Temple, Hosur
tagline: Chandra Choodeswarar Temple, Hosur — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Chandra Choodeswarar Temple, Hosur, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Chandra Choodeswarar Temple is an ancient Shiva temple located on a rocky hill in the city of Hosur, Krishnagiri District, Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: The Chandra Choodeswarar Temple is an ancient Shiva temple located on a rocky hill in the city of Hosur, Krishnagiri District, Tamil Nadu. Due to variations in the local languages (Tamil, Kannada, Telugu) and dialects, the temple is also referred to as 'Chandira Choodeshwarar', 'Chandra Choodeshwara', 'Chandra Choodeshwar', 'Shri Choodeswarar' or 'Arulmigu Chandra Choodeshwarar'. The main deities of the temple are Shiva, depicted as the Shiva linga and the Goddess Parvati, depicted as 'Maragathambal'.

topPlaces.description: Hosur division is a revenue division in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Hosur block
topPlaces.description: The Hosur block is a revenue block in the Krishnagiri district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 26 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Sacred Heart Church, Hosur
topPlaces.description: Sacred Heart Church is a Roman Catholic Parish church located in Hosur, Tamil Nadu, India. It falls under the jurisdiction of the Diocese of Dharmapuri.

topPlaces.name: Kenilworth Fort
topPlaces.description: Kenilworth Fort or Kenilworth Castle is situated in Hosur in the present day Krishnagiri district in the state of Tamil Nadu in India. Its architecture is based on that of Kenilworth Castle in England, making it probably the only fort in India built to resemble an English castle.

topPlaces.name: Hosur taluk
topPlaces.description: Hosur taluka is a taluka of Krishnagiri district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters is the City of Hosur.

topPlaces.name: Hosur
topPlaces.description: Hosur is an industrial city located in the Tamil Nadu state of India. Hosur is one of the 21 municipal corporations in Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Avalapalli
topPlaces.description: Avalapalli is a village in the Hosur taluk of Krishnagiri district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Our Lady of Lourdes Church, Hosur
topPlaces.description: Our Lady of Lourdes Church is located in the SIPCOT-1 area of Hosur, in the Krishnagiri district of Tamil Nadu, India. This church provides services to the north-western region of Hosur, catering to the Roman Catholic Christian community.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chandra Choodeswarar Temple, Hosur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chandra Choodeswarar Temple, Hosur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chandra Choodeswarar Temple, Hosur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (54 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (40 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chandra Choodeswarar Temple, Hosur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chandra Choodeswarar Temple, Hosur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chandra Choodeswarar Temple, Hosur?
faq.a: Stays in Chandra Choodeswarar Temple, Hosur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chandra Choodeswarar Temple, Hosur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Hosur division, Hosur block, Sacred Heart Church, Hosur, Kenilworth Fort, Hosur taluk.
